Term Sheet (India): Proposed acquisition of Blue Banyan Foods Private Limited by Meridian AgroTech Limited; non-binding, previously announced to exchanges on 03 May 2025; does not contain unpublished price sensitive information (UPSI).
Buyer: Meridian AgroTech Limited (equity listed on Indus Stock Exchange and Nava National Exchange); CIN: L12345MH2020PLC123456; Registered Office: Plot 42, Tech Enclave, Harigunj, Maharashtra.
Target: Blue Banyan Foods Private Limited; CIN (placeholder): U12345KA2019PTC00000X; Registered Office: 2nd Floor, Banyan House, Kalyan Layout, Harigunj, Karnataka.
Structure: All-cash acquisition of 100% of share capital, subject to definitive documentation, customary conditions precedent, and receipt of corporate approvals; no pricing or ratios included herein.
Regulatory and listing: Disclosures already made in accordance with the Indian securities regulator’s PIT regulations (2015) and the listing rules of ISE/NNE; trading window decisions to be handled per the Buyer’s code of conduct and prior public notice.
No UPSI: This document excludes financial projections, unpublished results, or confidential contracts; references are to public/stale facts and generic terms only.
DPDPA compliance: No collection of personal data of children (under 18); any KYC to be undertaken post-signing with consent and data minimisation; do not solicit Aadhaar or PAN copies at term-sheet stage.
Form labels (placeholders only): Name: __________; Address: __________; Aadhaar No.: 1234 5678 9012 (invalid placeholder); PAN: ABCDE1234F (sample only); Passport No.: Z1234567 (not to be shared at this stage).
Tax and registration (samples only): GSTIN (sample): 27ABCDE1234F1Z0 (checksum not validated); TAN: ABCD12345E (dummy); these are non-operational placeholders.
Banking (do not send funds): Bank A/c: 0000-XXXX-1234; IFSC: ABCD0123456 (dummy); UPI VPA: payments@meridian (role alias, non-live).
Contacts (role mailboxes/public helpdesk): legal@meridianagrotech.example.com; investorrelations@meridianagrotech.example.com; Toll-free Helpdesk: 1800-000-9090 (fictional).
Conditions precedent: Competition filing with the Indian Competition Authority (fictional), shareholder approvals, and third-party consents per material contracts; no exclusivity beyond 30 days unless extended by mutual email from role accounts.
Public information cross-references: Press release and investor presentation dated 03 May 2025 available at https://example.com/disclosure; summaries align with prior board approvals already published.
Data handling: Do not transmit government IDs, customer lists, or minor data via email; use redaction and anonymisation; retention capped at 90 days from lapse/termination unless legally required.
Governing law and forum: Laws of India; disputes to be resolved by arbitration seated in Harigunj under the rules of the Harigunj International Arbitration Centre; courts at Harigunj, MH for interim relief.
